creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-31 14:07:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-wikinotification Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Trac Wiki Notification is a plugin that allows users (even anonymous, as long
  as email is set) to select wiki pages that they wish to be notified (by email)
  when a change occurs on it.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/WikiNotificationPlugin
  
  PR:             ports/107272
  Submitted by:   Gerrit Beine <gerrit.beine at gmx.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1660    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/www/trac-wikinotification/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-wikinotification/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/trac-wikinotification/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/www/trac-wikinotification/pkg-plist (new)
